meaning: v.数,计算,计算在内,认为,有价值n.计数,计算,注意,伯爵
examples: What anyone else promises you doesn't count. Only what you can decide for yourself actually counts.
Her father was a Polish count.
Can I count on your loyalty?
She can count up to 10 in Italian.
So in that respect, black voters count for both Democrats as well as Republicans.
